messages.content: 採用全球首創的產品展示方式！  這句如何表達得更好呢
采用全球首创的产品展示方式，创造多功能媒体优势！
SourcingGuides.com采用全球首创的产品展示方式，创造多功能媒体优势，作为联系买家的枢纽中心，吸引买家的关注，产品在全年365天内持续宣传曝光，实现快速买卖洽商，全球销售，全球采购！translate to English

SourcingGuides.com adopts a globally pioneering product display method to create a multifunctional media advantage. As a hub connecting buyers, it attracts their attention and ensures continuous promotion and exposure for products throughout the year, enabling rapid business negotiations, global sales, and global procurement.
Business Partnership Referral Program 中文

Refer new supplier reward program
Invite your supplier partner and earn cash rewards. 

Referral rewards:
Every successful referral of a new supplier to join the SourcingGuides.com platform and participate in the promotional program, becoming a Super, Standard, Special supplier, and you will receive a 30% referral reward in the first year!
*Cash rewards will be deposited into the referrer’s FPS bank account.
中文

推荐新供应商奖励计划
邀请您的供应商伙伴，赚取现金奖励。

推荐奖励：
每成功推荐一个新供应商加入SourcingGuides.com平台并参与推广计划，成为超级、标准、特殊供应商，您将在首年获得30%的推荐奖励！
*现金奖励将存入推荐人的FPS银行账户。
推荐新供应商奖励计划
Special for Industry Topics: only 30 slots available for first-time suppliers to join us on first-time, first-served basis, while supplies last.
行业专题特别优惠：只有30个名额供首次供应商按照先到先得的原则参与，售完即止。

Remarks:  1) For every month with successful referrals of suppliers participating in the promotional program totaling over 1 million, you will receive an additional 5% referral reward.
                    2) The above plan amounts are calculated in Hong Kong dollars, and settlement in RMB or US dollars is based on the exchange rate of the day.

备注：1）每月成功推荐参与推广计划的供应商总额超过100万的情况下，您将额外获得5%的推荐奖励。
                 2）以上计划金额以港币计算，结算以当日汇率为基准，可使用人民币或美元结算。
